case_title: KIRCHER, VINCENT vs. DUNN, KENNETH WADE

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT AS TO DEFENDANT DUNN, KENNETH WADE SUMMONS ISSUED
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT DUNN, KENNETH WADE
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JUN-29-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

9:00AM, DEPT 8, CURTIS KARNOW, PRO TEM. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLTF PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL, DEFT FAILING TO APPEAR. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. CAUSE SUBMITTED. COURT RULES JUDGMENT FOR PLTF. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN & RETURNED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUNN, KENNETH WADE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1008 LARKIN ST. #207, S.F, CA. 94109 $2,057.86 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,057.86, LEASE FORFEITED
